creator: ian@majesticnet.com
text:
The distfile for this port is no longer available at the MASTERSITES 
listed in the Makefile for this port.  This patch should help to clear the 
good name of ports@FreeBSD.ORG from Bill Fenner's unfetchable distfiles page.  
I just am not sure if it is appropriate to just clear out the old sites from 
the MASTESITES list.  Someone else more knowledgable should decide.

Fix: Apply attached patch.

----
Common subdirectories: dclock.old/CVS and dclock/CVS
How-To-Repeat: 
        Try to fetch x11/dclock
